creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
My bug-271146 branch in GitHub <https://github.com/grahamperrin/freebsd-ports/tree/bug-271146> is a bare-bones beginning, two ports alone (virtualbox-ose, virtualbox-ose-kmod), build of which I'll test first in a 1400089 amd64 jail. 

If it does build and install, in any host environment, testers should take the usual precautions before proceeding with changes to any guest machine: 

* have verifiably good backups of all relevant guest data
* and so on.

Hint: .diff at <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/compare/main...grahamperrin:freebsd-ports:bug-271146.diff>
